hooks.command:
echo '## Critical Context (re-injected on compaction)
- Fireproof API: use useFireproofClerk() not useFireproof(). Never use _files API.
- Template build: bun scripts/merge-templates.js --force (after editing base template or deltas)
- Deploy: bun scripts/deploy-cloudflare.js --name <app> --file index.html (no wrangler needed)
- Auth: cached at ~/.vibes/auth.json via Pocket ID. Auto-opens browser on first deploy.
- React singleton: any esm.sh package depending on React MUST use ?external=react,react-dom
- Skills are atomic: never decompose into sub-steps
- Database names must stay stable across iterations
- Desktop build: bash scripts/build-desktop.sh'
